note_families.title: Description of Business and Organization
note_families.key_facts: RBI is a Canadian corporation; RBILP is an Ontario limited partnership; RBI is general partner. Operates TH, BK, PLK, FHS brands. Carrols acquisition completed May 2024.

note_families.title: Significant Accounting Policies
note_families.key_facts: Revenue recognition, lease accounting (lessor: ~4,700 restaurant properties), intangible assets, goodwill impairment testing, foreign currency, hedging. New accounting standards adopted.

note_families.title: Revenue Recognition / Unsatisfied Performance Obligations
note_families.key_facts: Estimated revenues from unsatisfied obligations: $53M (2026), $51M (2027), declining thereafter. Initial franchise fees recognized over franchise agreement term.

note_families.title: Equity Method Investments
note_families.key_facts: TIMWEN Partnership (50% JV with Wendy's for Canadian restaurant real estate). Distributions: $15M (2025), $14M (2024), $13M (2023). Rent expense: $21M (2025, 2024, 2023).

note_families.title: Intangible Assets and Goodwill
note_families.key_facts: RBI total intangible assets: $11.190B (2025). Goodwill: $6.306B (2025). Primarily brand value from BK, TH, PLK, FHS acquisitions.

note_families.title: Interest Expense
note_families.key_facts: Total interest expense (net): $516M (2025), $577M (2024), $582M (2023). Debt interest: $504M (2025). Finance lease obligations: $18M. Heavy debt service burden.

note_families.title: Long-Term Debt
key_facts: Credit Facilities: Term Loan B (SOFR + 1.75%), Term Loan A (SOFR + 0.75%-1.50%), Revolving Credit Facility ($1,250M, maturity Sep 2028, $1,248M available)
Senior Notes: 3.875% First Lien due 2028, 3.50% First Lien due 2029, 6.125% First Lien due 2029, 5.625% First Lien due 2029
Guarantors include PLK, BKC, TDL, FRG LLC and substantially all US/Canadian subsidiaries

note_families.title: Shareholders' Equity / Noncontrolling Interests
note_families.key_facts: 346.3M shares outstanding (2025). Noncontrolling interests: $1.525B. Net income attributable to NCI: $299M (2025).

note_families.title: Leases
note_families.key_facts: ~4,700 restaurant properties leased/subleased to franchisees. Initial terms: 10-20 years. Fixed monthly payments with escalations and renewal options. PLK property revenues from segment data: $13M F&P expenses (2025).

note_families.title: Franchise and Property Revenues
note_families.key_facts: Total franchise and property revenues: $2.960B (2025). Minimum lease payments from franchisees: $362M (2025), $367M (2024), $385M (2023) — declining trend.

note_families.title: Income Tax Expense
note_families.key_facts: Income tax expense from continuing operations: $483M (2025), $364M (2024), ($265M) benefit in 2023. Effective tax rate ~29% in 2025.

key_financial_observations.leverage: Very high leverage — $13.25B long-term debt against $5.159B total equity (2.57x debt-to-equity). Interest expense $516M/year.
key_financial_observations.distributions: Net income attributable to NCI: $299M (2025). Dividends paid from RBI common shares.
key_financial_observations.related_party: TIMWEN Partnership (50% JV with Wendy's). Carrols Restaurant Group acquisition completed May 2024.
key_financial_observations.asset_composition: Intangible assets ($11.19B) and goodwill ($6.31B) dominate — 68% of total assets are intangible/goodwill.
key_financial_observations.revenue_trend: Total revenues: $7.022B (2023) → $8.406B (2024) → $9.434B (2025) — strong growth driven by Carrols acquisition and organic
